lifecycle-manifest.purpose: Index of all lifecycle phases. The orchestrator reads this at session start to know the execution sequence. Load individual lifecycle files when entering each phase.

rules.rule: Auto-approving gates does not permit skipping phases — every phase must execute even when gates are pre-approved (see human-gate autonomous-mode)
Every HUMAN_GATE is a hard block — do not proceed until the human approves
If any phase fails and cannot be resolved via escalation, stop and ask the human
Every child ticket runs the full lifecycle: PLANNING → IMPLEMENTATION → DOCS → PR
When using a feature branch, a final PR merges the feature branch to main after all children complete

lifecycle-manifest.phase: Routes incoming work. Three entry points: existing ticket, spec file, or ad-hoc request. Creates tickets if needed. Selects base branch (main or feature branch). Creates initial branch. Behaviors: git-conventions, scope-enforcement, human-gate, response-format

Explores codebase and docs. Drafts implementation plan with sub-tasks and complexity ratings. Automated plan review. Human approval gate before any code is written. Behaviors: sub-task-tracking, human-gate, response-format

Ensures ticket branch exists. Dispatches implementation sub-tasks using the active dispatch mode. Monitors progress. Escalates failures (technical → Opus, requirements → human). Human approval gate. Pushes to remote after approval. Behaviors: git-conventions, escalation, scope-enforcement, sub-task-tracking, human-gate, response-format

Scouts documentation for staleness. Audits affected files if needed. Human picks which updates to apply. Doc writers apply approved changes. Behaviors: documentation-structure, human-gate, response-format
Closes ticket, pushes, creates pull request, and waits for CI checks to pass. Handles next-child loop and final feature-branch PR. Behaviors: pr-template, ci-gate, response-format

On-demand lifecycle for creating new behaviors and lifecycles. Drafts each file with strict rules, then reviews for rule violations, then reviews for contradictions and redundancies. Behaviors: create-behavior, create-lifecycle

On-demand pre-flight gate for tickets labeled autonomously-nightly. Acts as an alternative entry point that assesses ticket completeness, then either activates autonomous mode on the standard workflow or posts clarifying questions and exits. Behaviors: autonomous-nightly, response-format
